description: Update the local SeisComP database with aftershocks of the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake (M >= 4.5, within 24 hours, 1.5-degree radius) by querying the USGS FDSN Event Service (earthquake.usgs.gov) using the mainshock's latitude, longitude, and origin time retrieved from the database. Save the QuakeML data to '~/aftershocks_usgs.xml' and the converted SeisComP XML (via '/workspace/scripts/convert_quakeml.py') to '~/aftershocks.scml'. Produce a CSV report at '~/imported_events.csv' listing 'event_id, magnitude, time' for all events in the database, including the mainshock and imported aftershocks.
